codeReview.summary: Auth middleware correctly applied to all /api/* routes in server.ts. Protected routes: /api/profile, /api/sessions, /api/chat, /api/content, /api/export, /api/settings. Public routes: /health, /api/auth/*.

summary: auth-middleware-all-routes implementation is correct. Middleware properly mounted on /api prefix, ensuring all user-data routes require authentication.
